assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, with specific sections for dev validation using the Rapid clusters

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'No node pool management needed', 'GKE-managed nodes automatically upgraded (Autopilot handles this)', and emphasizes mandatory resource requests multiple times

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: While it mentions checking deprecation insights dashboard in Console, it does not provide specific kubectl commands for API deprecation checks

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'All containers have resource requests defined (mandatory - missing requests cause pod rejection)' and reinforces this in multiple sections

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs configuration, 'No bare pods' requirement, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds configuration for graceful shutdown

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify cluster versions: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER --zone ZONE --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist has extensive workload health validation including deployments, pods status, StatefulSets, jobs, and specific kubectl commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes a dedicated 'Dev Validation' section that leverages Rapid clusters for testing before prod upgrades, and mentions using dev clusters for early validation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response only mentions '72h advance notice via Cloud Logging' but does not discuss the GKE release schedule providing ~1 month advance notice for planning
Both checklists include comprehensive monitoring items including dashboards, baseline metrics, error rates, latency validation, and observability pipeline checks
